channel.title: Zion Tech Group
channel.description: AI, IT & Micro SAAS Solutions — 662 services and growing.

item.title: AI Chatbot Builder - No Code
item.description: Drag-and-drop chatbot builder with pre-trained industry templates. Deploy on your website, WhatsApp, or social media in minutes.

item.title: AI Analytics & BI
item.description: Transform your data into actionable insights with our advanced AI analytics platform.

item.title: AI Carbon Footprint Optimizer
item.description: Automated Scope 1-3 carbon accounting: ingests utility bills, cloud usage, travel itineraries, supplier invoices, and calculates real-time carbon intensity scores with prioritised reduction actions and ESG report-ready outputs.

item.title: Contract Lifecycle Intelligence
item.description: AI contract lifecycle management: extract clauses and dates, auto-flag risk, renewal calendar, benchmark against market terms, amendment tracker across 200+ contract types.

item.title: Conversational AI Platform
item.description: Build and deploy intelligent chatbots and virtual assistants that understand context, maintain conversation memory, and integrate with your systems.

item.title: AI Customer Support
item.description: 24/7 AI-powered customer service with intelligent ticket routing, auto-resolution, and sentiment analysis.

item.title: Document AI - Intelligent Processing
item.description: Extract, classify, and process data from documents with AI. Invoices, contracts, forms, receipts - structured data from unstructured documents.

item.title: AI Document Intelligence
item.description: End-to-end intelligent document processing with 99%+ accuracy OCR, classification, field-level data extraction, and automated workflow triggers.

item.title: Fintech Fraud Graph
item.description: Real-time fraud detection as a knowledge graph: entity resolution across accounts, IP, device, and card fingerprints; ML scoring per transaction in under 15ms; SAR and CTR auto-draft; global rule engine.

item.title: AI Fraud Detection and Prevention
item.description: Real-time fraud detection for transactions, accounts, and applications. ML models trained on billions of transactions with sub-100ms scoring.

item.title: AI Knowledge Graph Search Engine
item.description: Deep semantic search across structured + unstructured corporate knowledge: auto-builds a navigable knowledge graph from Confluence, Slack, Drive, Jira, and CRM; facet navigation, path-finding between related entities, and answer synthesis with cited sources.

item.title: AI Knowledge Management
item.description: Centralize organizational knowledge with AI-powered semantic search, auto-tagging, content gap detection, and intelligent Q&A across your document corpus.

item.title: AI Lead Generation & Enrichment
item.description: Automatically discover, qualify, and enrich B2B leads with web scraping, firmographic scoring, and intent signal detection.

item.title: AI Lead Scoring and Qualification
item.description: Automatically score and qualify leads based on behavior, firmographics, and engagement. Prioritize your sales team's time on the best prospects.

item.title: Predictive Analytics Engine
item.description: Turn historical data into forward-looking insights. Demand forecasting, churn prediction, revenue projection with explainable AI models.

item.title: Predictive Maintenance AI
item.description: Predict equipment failures before they happen. IoT sensor data analysis, anomaly detection, and maintenance scheduling optimization.

item.title: AI Sales Intelligence
item.description: Boost revenue with AI-driven lead scoring, pipeline prediction, deal insights, and automated outreach sequencing.

item.title: Sustainable Supply Chain Radar
item.description: Supply-chain ESG tracking: carbon-intensity per supplier tier, green-alternative sourcing score, Scope 3 quantification, regulatory dashboard for CSRD and CBAM, and regulatory penalty simulator per scenario.

item.title: Voice-First CRM & Sales Assistant
item.description: Voice-first CRM for field sales and inside sales teams: automatic call transcription, real-time deal coaching via live prompt injection, pipeline update via voice command, contact enrichment, and post-call auto-summary + next-step action items.

item.title: Compliance Automation Platform
item.description: Automate compliance monitoring, evidence collection, and reporting. SOC2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, GDPR - continuous compliance not annual audits.

item.title: Legal Document Intelligence Pipeline
item.description: OCR + NLP document-intelligence: pipeline-abstract multi-service orchestration for contracts, invoices, and regulatory submissions; auto-classification, clause extraction, anomaly flag, e-signature ready, approval routing.

item.title: Automated Document Processing
item.description: End-to-end document processing: intake, classification, data extraction, validation, routing, and archival. Eliminate manual document handling.

item.title: Integrated Commerce Flow Orchestrator
item.description: Commerce workflow automation: cart-to-delivery orchestrator connecting Shopify/BigCommerce/WooCommerce with payment and shipping providers, automated RMA/return-handling, subscription-billing orchestrator, revenue reconciliation engine.

item.title: Automated Invoice Processing
item.description: Capture, extract, validate, and process invoices automatically. Match against POs, route for approval, and post to accounting systems.

item.title: Multi-Channel Campaign Manager
item.description: Orchestrate campaigns across email, SMS, social, push, and ads from one campaign studio: audience-segmentation engine, content-Calendar view, A/B-n testing, real-time ROI dashboard, attribution across 10 channels.

item.title: Multi-Channel Campaign Orchestrator
item.description: Orchestrate campaigns across email, SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and LinkedIn with sequence branching, per-channel A/B testing, delay per touchpoint, re-engagement windows, engaged versus unengaged segment filter, and unified inbound conversation inbox.

item.title: RPA - Robotic Process Automation
item.description: Automate repetitive software tasks with software robots. Data entry, form filling, report generation, system integration - no APIs needed.

item.title: Workflow Automation Platform
item.description: Connect your apps and automate business processes. Visual workflow builder with 200+ app integrations and conditional logic.

item.title: Data Lakehouse Platform
item.description: Unified data lakehouse: ingest CSV, JSON, Parquet, and streams; implement ACID semantics with open-table format Delta Lake or Iceberg engine; SQL query with cardinality optimizer; built-in BI tool connectors; schema enforcement at write time.

item.title: Edge AI Deployment Platform
item.description: One-click edge AI model deployment to 50k+ global edge points-of-presence: ONNX/TensorRT/GGUF model package, auto-scaling inference, A/B model rollout, cold-warm-cache tiering, and robust offline-first sync for disconnected sites.

item.title: Event-Driven Microservices Platform
item.description: Event backbone as a service: managed Pub-Sub broker, event schema registry, replay from any timestamp, dead-letter queue management, per-service event-sourcing, per-event observability, and fan-out handler groups.

item.title: Hybrid + Multi-Cloud Networking
item.description: Zero-trust networking across on-prem/edge/cloud: cloud-router fabric connects VPCs across AWS/GCP/Azure, on-prem data-centre via WireGuard or IPSec, global anycast front-door with WAF.

item.title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
item.description: Seamless migration to AWS, Azure, or GCP with zero downtime, cost optimization, and infrastructure-as-code automation.

item.title: Cybersecurity & Penetration Testing
item.description: Comprehensive security assessments, vulnerability management, and incident response to protect your digital assets.

item.title: Graph Analytics & Network Intelligence
item.description: Large-scale network analytics: entity relationship graph builder, centrality and community detection, per-edge anomaly scoring, influencer score per node, GNN-ready feature export, and interactive graph visualisation dashboard.

item.title: Real-time Event & Trending Aggregator
item.description: Streaming data platform: Flink/Redpanda backbone, windowed aggregation at sub-second latency, trend-detection anomaly alerts, opentelemetry distributed-tracing per event, dashboarding per team with live drill-through.

item.title: DevOps & CI/CD Automation
item.description: End-to-end CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, GitOps workflows, and site reliability engineering.

item.title: API Gateway + OpenAPI Management
item.description: Enterprise API gateway: OpenAPI 3.1 lifecycle, rate-limit/quota per key, threat-protection WAF rules, schema registry, live API analytics, developer portal with interactive docs and sandbox.

item.title: API Management & Gateway
item.description: Full API lifecycle management: unified gateway with auth, rate-limit, circuit-breaker, developer portal with auto-generated OpenAPI docs, per-tenant analytics, and API monetisation. Supports REST, GraphQL, and gRPC.

item.title: Backup & Disaster Recovery Solution
item.description: Immutable backup engine with RPO as low as 5 minutes, RTO of 30 minutes, off-site air-gapped storage, Lamport-timestamp chain-of-custody for tamper evidence, ransomware-hold per snapshot, point-in-time restore, and automated DR drill scheduling.

item.title: Backup / DR/BCaaS
item.description: Managed backup and disaster recovery: 3-2-1-1-airgap policy, every-30s WORM snapshots, point-in-time restore to 90 days, failover tests every 30 min, 4-hour RTO, 15-min RPO SLA.

item.title: Backup and Disaster Recovery (BDR) Suite
item.description: Enterprise backup and DR with automated failover, ransomware protection, and tested recovery procedures.

item.title: Cloud Migration Express - Lift, Shift and Optimize
item.description: End-to-end cloud migration: assessment, planning, migration, optimization, post-migration support. AWS, Azure, GCP certified engineers.

item.title: Endpoint Protection and Device Security
item.description: Next-gen antivirus, EDR, and device management. Protect laptops, desktops, servers, mobile from malware, ransomware, zero-day.

item.title: Complete Managed IT Operations
item.description: Full-service IT management. We become your IT department - helpdesk, infrastructure, security, monitoring, and strategic planning.

item.title: Outsourced IT Helpdesk (Tier 1-2)
item.description: White-label or co-branded IT helpdesk. Certified technicians handle password resets, software issues, hardware troubleshooting, onboarding.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Code Reviewer
item.description: AI-powered code review that catches bugs, security vulnerabilities, and performance issues before merge. Supports 40+ languages.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Contract Analyzer
item.description: AI-powered contract review and analysis. Automatically extracts key terms, flags risky clauses, compares against templates, and generates summary reports.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Cybersecurity Monitor
item.description: Continuous AI-powered cybersecurity monitoring for SMBs. Detects threats in real-time, auto-remediates common attacks, and provides compliance reporting.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Smart Email Responder
item.description: Intelligent email management that categorizes, prioritizes, drafts replies, and sends responses with human-in-the-loop approval.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Invoice Processor
item.description: Automated invoice data extraction and processing using AI. Reads PDF/scan invoices, extracts line items, validates against POs, and syncs with accounting systems.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Meeting Minutes Generator
item.description: Automatically generates structured meeting minutes from video/audio recordings. AI identifies action items, decisions, and key discussion points.

item.title: Micro-SAAS AI Website Builder
item.description: AI-powered website builder that creates professional websites from a simple description. Includes SEO optimization, responsive design, and built-in analytics.

item.title: Privileged Access Management
item.description: PAM platform: just-in-time privilege elevation, live session recording with playback, FIPS-140-2 certified credential vault, break-glass override, least-privilege policy engine per role, and quarterly access certification auto-workflow.

item.title: SBOM & Supply Chain Security
item.description: Supply chain security platform: SBOM & VEX generation (every build/build event), CVE SLSA provenance score, dependency-graph diff for every PR, SLSA Level 3 attestation, reproducible-build verification.

item.title: Software Bill-of-Materials Manager
item.description: Full SBOM lifecycle management: auto-generate SPDX and Cyclone-DX per build, license-compliance check, vulnerability and CVE matching per component, attestation signing, and SBOM consumer portal per vendor release.

item.title: Web Application Firewall
item.description: Managed WAF with OWASP Top-10 rulesets, API-protection for OWASP API Top-10, bot management with human-versus-bot scoring, CDN-integrated DDoS mitigation, rate-limiting, geo-blocking, and custom rule pipeline per region.

item.title: Accessibility & WCAG Compliance
item.description: Automated WCAG 2.2 auditing, AI-powered remediation suggestions, screen reader simulation, and continuous accessibility compliance monitoring.

item.title: Advanced AI & Enterprise Intelligence Hub
item.description: Unify generative AI, autonomous agents, multimodal intelligence, RAG, governance, observability, and enterprise copilots into a single advanced AI ...

item.title: Agentic Workflow Orchestrator
item.description: Orchestrate multi-agent AI workflows: DAG of agents with routing, handoff, conditional branches, state persistence, retry logic, human-review gates. LangGraph/Semantic Kernel backend.

item.title: 5 Proven AI Automation Strategies for Enterprise Workflow Optimization
item.description: Latest insights from Zion Tech Group.

item.description: Latest insights from Zion Tech Group.
